subject: Fixed policy participant config to use https
commit_message:
Fixed policy participant config to use https

Changed to use "useHttps" instead of "https"
Added config to bind mount for policy participant

Issue-ID: POLICY-3817
Change-Id: I7470ea45ebb769a8781b76422626e13b5eb515bd
Signed-off-by: saul.gill <saul.gill@est.tech>
(cherry picked from commit d6803f7f1551fa2382a61d265388c537bdb76d5d)

> I think it is best to keep the same

Hi Jorge. I am not sure of Liam's view on this as he is on leave today. There is an OOM review to change the https config - that will be cherry picked to Istanbul once approved. I thought it was his plan to raise a separate OOM review for the username but am not sure if he intended to cherry pick to Istanbul or not.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1:

> 
> Hi Jorge. I am not sure of Liam's view on this as he is on leave today. There is an OOM review to change the https config - that will be cherry picked to Istanbul once approved. I thought it was his plan to raise a separate OOM review for the username but am not sure if he intended to cherry pick to Istanbul or not.

Oh, OK, thanks for the feedback.  I may have missed some things while I was on vacation.  I guess I am confused since to have the api/pap/xacml account change on OOM side will require to change the robot testsuite that OOM runs for gating, and all the config.json files for those components.   I don't think they will allow changes at this time in istanbul and that can take time.   In any case, it seems to me why make things more difficult in istanbul, unless there is some problem that we are trying to correct.   I guess my thinkings is that we should be touching istanbul as little as possible with code changes unless they are documentation, or bugs.   Is the account change trying to correct some breakage that I may not be aware, wouldn't it need to change the API, PAP, XACML config.json to match the credentials change?

I guess I am confused since to have the api/pap/xacml account change on OOM side will require to change the robot testsuite that OOM runs for gating, and all the config.json files for those components.   I don't think they will allow changes at this time in istanbul and that can take time.   In any case, it seems to me why make things more difficult in istanbul, unless there is some problem that we are trying to correct.   I guess my thinkings is that we should be touching istanbul as little as possible with code changes unless they are documentation, or bugs.   Is the account change trying to correct some breakage that I may not be aware, wouldn't it need to change the API, PAP, XACML config.json to match the credentials change?

What you are saying makes sense. I will try to edit this review to remove the changes to the username as you suggest. Adheli said she will try to contact you on Slack about the OOM Gating changes for Jakarta. Thanks Jorge
